message:
🐛 Scroll to top when navigating between dashboards (#250)

Replace in-session scroll restoration with scroll-to-top on route
changes. Scroll position is still saved to localStorage and restored
on app load (login/session restore), but navigating between dashboards
now always starts at the top.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
